task_type: Type C small implementation - read-only contract validators only (no DB write, no executable gate, no backtest)
source_decision: P258E_D3_READ_ONLY_SKELETON_CONTRACT_TESTS_READY - implement the existing validation stubs as pure contract checks only

validation_result_semantics.success: Returns an immutable ValidationResult naming the validator and checked fields. Success means only that the provided synthetic/read-only contract object is structurally complete.
validation_result_semantics.failure: Raises ContractValidationError with a deterministic message.
validation_result_semantics.non_semantics: Success is not gate survival, not candidate scoring, not improved prediction accuracy, not approval, not production readiness, and not recommendation permission.

candidate_provenance: required candidate/provenance fields are present and non-empty
N-bet count, numbers per bet, feature dimensionality, and parameter count are positive
random_seed is present as an integer
p257a_baseline: baseline lottery_type, target_draw_id, and n_bet_count match the candidate
matched_null_family: matched lottery, N, numbers per bet, window schedule, feature dimensionality, and parameter count match the candidate
null_generation_seed is declared as an integer without generating nulls
correction_family: candidate_methods, null_variants, lottery_types, n_bet_counts, metrics, and windows are declared
all correction-family declarations are non-empty collections
no_approval_status: GateStatus enum remains exactly REJECTED and NOT_YET_REJECTED
APPROVED, PROMOTED, PRODUCTION_READY, and RECOMMENDED are rejected

proof_no_executable_gate_evaluation: No run_gate/evaluate/orchestrator module or candidate scoring path exists. Validators inspect metadata only and return ValidationResult or raise ContractValidationError.
proof_no_null_generation: No null_factory module exists. The matched-null validator checks declared metadata such as null_count and null_generation_seed but does not generate any null samples.
proof_no_pvalue_statistical_test_or_back: No p-value computation, paired statistical test, bootstrap, McNemar test, draw loop, strategy execution, or backtest function exists in the P258F validators.
proof_no_forbidden_paths_touched: gate_validation.py imports only stdlib helpers and local schemas. It imports no DB, recommendation, production, registry, controlled_apply, deployment, backtest, fetcher, network, random, numpy, or scipy modules.

gate_status_enum.not_yet_rejected_semantics: NOT_YET_REJECTED is not approval. It remains observation-only and cannot authorize recommendation or production use.

next_allowed_task.title: D3 synthetic-fixture-only contract validator hardening
next_allowed_task.type: read-only synthetic-fixture hardening only; no real candidate methods, no gate evaluation, no null generation, no p-values, no paired tests, no backtest
next_allowed_task.precondition: P258F merged and separate explicit authorization for P258G

forbidden_next_tasks: running D3 on real candidate methods
